# Life OS Pro

> Life OS Pro is a unified personal operating system that integrates strategic life planning, phase-based financial budgeting, project management, and weekly accountability coaching into one platform. It solves "The Drift" — the disconnect between your stated goals, your spending patterns, and your daily actions that occurs when you use separate apps for planning, budgeting, and task management.

Life OS Pro replaces the need to juggle tools like Notion (for goals), YNAB (for budgeting), and Todoist (for tasks) by connecting all three through a shared data layer called the "Shared Memory Spine." When your goals change, your budget adapts. When your spending drifts, your weekly review catches it.

## Core Modules

- [Life Strategy Architect](https://lifeospro.io/methodology/architect.md): AI-powered life planning using a 4-Quadrant framework (DO, HAVE, BE, LIVE) across Professional and Personal tracks. Generates quarterly roadmaps with conflict detection and sustainability guardrails.
- [Tempo Financial OS](https://lifeospro.io/methodology/tempo.md): Phase-based budgeting engine that splits months into Phase 1 (days 1-15) and Phase 2 (days 16-end). Calculates a real-time "Safe-to-Spend" number based on current balance, unpaid bills, and safety buffer.
- [Project Command Center](https://lifeospro.io/methodology/projects.md): Goal-to-project execution tracker that links Architect milestones to actionable projects with timelines, cost plans, and dependency tracking.
- [Weekly Momentum Commander](https://lifeospro.io/methodology/commander.md): Weekly accountability system with a 100-point CEO Score (50 pts execution, 30 pts finance, 20 pts mindset) that generates a Weekly Flight Plan with Big 3 tasks and financial guardrails.

## Key Concepts

- **The Drift**: The core problem Life OS Pro solves. The natural disconnect between what people say matters (goals) and what their calendar and spending prove they actually do.
- **Safe-to-Spend**: Tempo's flagship calculation. Formula: Current Balance - Safety Buffer - Unpaid Bills in Current Phase. Tells you exactly what you can spend today without jeopardizing upcoming bills.
- **Phase System**: Months are divided into Phase 1 (days 1-15) and Phase 2 (days 16-end of month) to align with common paycheck cycles and prevent false confidence from seeing a full bank account when large bills are still due.
- **CEO Score**: A gamified 100-point weekly score measuring Execution (50 pts), Finance (30 pts), and Mindset (20 pts) that quantifies alignment between actions and goals.
- **Prime Directive**: The system's golden rule — always protect the Personal LIVE quadrant from being overwhelmed by Professional ambition.
- **Shared Memory Spine**: The data architecture that connects all modules. Goals from the Architect feed into Tempo's budget targets and the Commander's weekly priorities.
- **Card Reserve**: Internal ledger tracking credit card purchases not yet paid from the bank, ensuring Safe-to-Spend remains truthful even when spending on cards.
- **Liquidity Trap**: A warning when Phase 1 shows a surplus but Phase 2 is underwater, preventing users from spending early cash that's needed later.

## Tempo — Standalone Budgeting App

Tempo is the standalone financial clarity layer of Life OS Pro, available as a separate product at https://tempo.lifeospro.io. It is a Progressive Web App (PWA) focused on one core question: "What can I safely spend right now without missing a bill?"

- **Safe-to-Spend**: Real-time number based on Current Balance − Safety Buffer − Unpaid Phase Bills
- **Phase System**: Month split into Phase 1 (days 1–15) and Phase 2 (days 16–end) aligned with paycheck cycles
- **Bill Radar**: Overdue and upcoming bills with one-tap mark-paid
- **FlowBot Diagnostics**: 5 financial health statuses — healthy, liquidity trap, structural deficit, low liquidity, over budget
- **Spending Budgets**: 16 default categories with planned vs. actual tracking and month-end savings forecast
- **Pricing**: 7-day free trial, then $4.99/month or Pro at $9.99/month (founding rate, locked forever)
- **No bank connection required** — manual balance entry for maximum privacy

Tempo is the entry point for users who need financial clarity before tackling the full Life OS Pro system. Pro tier of Tempo unlocks all Life OS Pro modules.

## Differentiators vs Competitors

- **vs YNAB**: Life OS Pro adds liquidity timing (phase-based budgeting), weekly execution coaching, and goal integration. YNAB focuses on envelope budgeting but lacks forward-looking cash flow intelligence.
- **vs Monarch Money**: Life OS Pro is a decision engine, not a passive mirror. Monarch excels at aggregation and net worth tracking but does not drive behavior change through weekly accountability loops.
- **vs Notion**: Life OS Pro provides structured frameworks (4 Quadrants, CEO Score, Phase System) rather than blank canvas flexibility. It connects goal planning directly to financial reality and weekly execution.
- **vs Todoist/Things**: Life OS Pro tasks are derived from quarterly roadmap milestones and financially grounded, not standalone to-do items disconnected from strategy.

## Product Details

- **Pricing**: Founding Member rate $9.99/month (locked forever, limited to 250 members), Standard rate $14.99/month, 7-day free trial included.
- **Tech Stack**: Python/Streamlit frontend, Supabase (PostgreSQL) backend, Stripe billing, AI coaching via language model integration.
- **Target User**: Power users who have outgrown individual productivity apps and want an integrated system connecting their vision, money, and weekly actions.
- **Website**: [https://lifeospro.io](https://lifeospro.io)
